overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting an outdoor wooden pavilion classroom in a magical school setting, with students in dark wizard robes gathered around rustic tables and a professor near the entrance, set against a lush forest backdrop with dappled sunlight filtering through.

segments.scene_description: The scene presents a stationary view of an outdoor wooden pavilion classroom set in a forest clearing. Students in dark wizard robes stand scattered around rustic wooden tables while a professor observes from near the dark doorway at the back. The stone-paved floor and heavy timber beams create a sheltered yet open-air learning environment, with lush green forest visible through the open sides of the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, immersive view of an outdoor wooden pavilion classroom nestled within a serene forest clearing. It begins by capturing the sheltered learning environment, where students in dark wizard robes are scattered around rustic wooden tables. The camera lingers on the contrast between the heavy timber beams and the stone-paved floor, while a professor observes the class from near a dark doorway at the back. The scene then opens outward, drawing the eye through the open sides of the structure toward the lush green forest that surrounds the pavilion.
